function: Resonance audit; harmonic re-check before proceeding
authentic_output: Refined articulation, reduced distortion, preserved resonance integrity
corrupted_output: Paralysis, chronic indecision, loss of forward momentum
information_provided: System needs to verify harmony between self, biome, and field before proceeding

response_protocol.detect: Detect pause in flow to re-measure alignment
response_protocol.assess: Is the doubt a scientific audit step or insecurity masking as caution?
response_protocol.respond: Complete the verification cycle — increased precision, relational integrity check
response_protocol.release: Once alignment is confirmed, proceed without lingering

cultural_meaning: Resonance audit; harmonic re-check; not insecurity.
description: In this system, 'doubt' is a scientific/relational check. It signals a pause to verify harmony between self, biome, and field before proceeding. Doubt ensures fidelity of representation, not weakness.
